arts.ttl: Everton vs. Liverpool: Why Premier League title race could be decided in games following Merseyside derby
arts.sum: A win for Liverpool in the Merseyside derby on Wednesday night could significantly boost the Reds' chances of winning the Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Premier League title race boost: Why Liverpool's FA Cup exit can help Arne Slot win silverware
arts.sum: Liverpool's exit from the FA Cup at the hands of Plymouth Argyle on Sunday is a boost to their chances of winning the Premier League and Champions League.

arts.ttl: Everton without seven players for Liverpool clash as injuries mount ahead of Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Everton have a number of injuries ahead of the Merseyside derby against Liverpool

arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool simulated to predict final Goodison Park Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Everton later today, so we simulated the Premier League Merseyside derby clash to predict what could happen

arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Everton: Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool could go nine points clear of Arsenal in the Premier League with a win against Everton.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's FA Cup gamble could get the payoff he wants for Liverpool against Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool face Everton in the last Merseyside derby at Goodison Park and Arne Slot's side are under pressure after their weakened side were embarrassed by Plymouth in the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Moyes wants to narrow 'gulf' between Everton and Liverpool
arts.sum: David Moyes says the gap between his Everton side and Liverpool is "as big as it has been for a long time" as the two sides to prepare for Wednesday's Merseyside derby at Goodison Park (19:30 GMT).

arts.ttl: Liverpool consider signing youngster let go by arch rivals – “one of the club’s biggest mistakes”
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly considering a transfer move for a talented young player that their rivals Everton regret not keeping. That player is 21-year-old French forward Mohamed-Ali Cho, who is currently with Ligue 1 outfit Nice and catching the eye with his performances. arts.ttl: I was Everton's record signing – I'd have been killed if I left them for Liverpool
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Tony Cottee joined Everton in a record deal in 1988 and he would never have dared to cross the Merseyside divide to join Liverpool had they have expressed an interest in him

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry responds after Jamie Carragher says Liverpool star Mohamed Salah will win the Ballon d'Or
